CVE-2006-0048.title: Francesco Stablum tcpick 0.2.1 allows remote attackers to cause a ...
CVE-2006-0048.description: Francesco Stablum tcpick 0.2.1 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (segmentation fault) via certain fragmented packets, possibly involving invalid headers and an attacker-controlled payload length.  NOTE: this issue might be a buffer overflow or overread.
